name: Colosseum_Wireless_Network_Emulator
summary:
Colosseum_Wireless_Network_Emulator
This project exploits GNU Radio IEEE 802.11 transceiver to instantiate a ad hoc network via Wi-Fi on the Colosseum Wireless Network Emulator. Key tasks aim to connect nodes, make reservations, verify setup, start Wi-Fi nodes, monitor packets, configure scenarios, run scripts, analyze spectrum, and troubleshooting.

use_cases:
When you need Wireless, use Colosseum_Wireless_Network_Emulator because Colosseum_Wireless_Network_Emulator
This project exploits GNU Radio IEEE 802.11 transceiver to instantiate a ad hoc network via Wi-Fi on the Colosseum Wireless .
When chaining Wireless tools, pair Colosseum_Wireless_Network_Emulator with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `Colosseum_Wireless_Network_Emulator --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
